Who We Are

Built on Trust.
Growing with Vision.

Alpha Estates entered a new chapter in 2026 with a strong vision — to deliver trusted, transparent, and customer-focused real estate solutions.

Backed by practical market experience and verified opportunities, Alpha Estates helps customers make confident decisions for both future investment and premium living.

At Alpha Estates, we believe real estate is not just about buying property — it is about building trust and securing your future.

✓

Verified Projects Only

Every project verified for credibility, legal approvals and developer background.

🎯

Customer-First Approach

We focus on your goals — budget, lifestyle, and future investment expectations.

🔒

Honest & Transparent

No hidden charges, no confusion — complete transparency at every step.

Our Story

Growing with Trust

2021
The real estate journey began through trusted property guidance and market expertise — building relationships, one customer at a time.
2022
Mokal Realtors officially registered with a strong customer-first approach. Built on trust, transparency, and verified property guidance.
2026
Alpha Estates launched — a new chapter focused on trust, verified projects, and premium customer experience across MMR.
Today
Successfully guided 50+ customers through trusted property site visits. Growing stronger every day.

Since 2021, Mokal Realtors has been committed to guiding customers toward the right real estate opportunities. Officially registered in 2022, built on trust, transparency, and verified property guidance with confidence.

Why Choose Us

Why Buy Through
Alpha Estates?

Same developer price. Zero extra cost. But with benefits that no developer will ever give you directly.

⭐
Same Developer Price
You pay exactly what the developer charges. Not a single rupee extra — ever. Alpha Estates is 100% free for buyers.
🚗
Free Site Visit
We personally accompany you on every site visit. You see the project, we handle everything — transport, timing, guidance.
🏦
Home Loan — 10+ Trusted Bankers
Access to 10+ verified banking partners. We find you the best interest rate, fastest approval, minimum documentation.
🎯
Best Unit Selection
We analyse floor, view, vastu, resale value and future appreciation — then recommend the single best unit for you.
💰
Negotiation Advantage
Discounts, freebies and payment flexibility that a developer will never offer you directly — only through trusted channel partners like us.
📋
End-to-End Support
From first inquiry to final registration — legal checks, paperwork, loan processing. We stay with you till the keys are in your hand.
Ready to find your perfect property?
Let us guide you — completely free.
